comment: Exact lexical match of class label and congruent modeling of administrator role (both are subclasses of Person).
Exact lexical match of class label; both represent people with similar structural constraints (email, address, etc.).
Exact lexical match and similar modeling (subclass of Person with writing/writes relationships to papers/contributions).
Exact lexical match of class label; both model paper/contribution artifacts in the conference domain.
Exact lexical match and similar modeling (conference as an event/organizational entity).
Structural similarity: both are specialized persons with reviewing responsibilities (restrictions on review properties); labels differ but roles align (ProgramCommitteeMember ≈ Member_PC).
High lexical similarity (ConferenceChair vs Chair_PC) and similar position within conference organization hierarchies.
Exact lexical match of property name; both are inverseOf properties for authorship (domain: review/contribution, range: reviewer/author).
Lexical similarity (writePaper vs writes) and analogous semantics (author writes contribution/paper); cmt:writePaper is inverseOf hasAuthor, confOf:writes inverseOf writtenBy.
High lexical similarity and identical datatype semantics (email / hasEmail) with domain Person in both ontologies.
